title.en: After becoming the Eternal Master, Ye Tian was ...

content.en:
After becoming the Eternal Master, Ye Tian was very fast.

He kept shuttling and weaving, and soon came to the Boundary River area where the Xuanlei Black Valley was located.

At this time, he took out the Xuanlei Seal and sensed the location of the Xuanlei Black Valley.

Immediately, as soon as the Xuanlei Seal was activated, Ye Tian's body was carried by the Xuanlei Seal into the Xuanlei Black Valley.

......

Xuanlei Black Valley.

Ye Tian came in and stood at the entrance of the Xuanlei Black Valley.

From the outside, the entire Xuanlei Black Valley was pitch black, like a giant mouth of the abyss, and it was difficult for even the Eternal Controller to spy on the situation in the Xuanlei Black Valley.

And from time to time, there were thunderous sounds from the depths of the Xuanlei Black Valley.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian stepped into the Xuanlei Black Valley and began to look for the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

It takes 33 million realm river years for the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit to grow, and for such a long time, the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit here will be taken away by other Eternal Masters as soon as it grows up!

Although there are very few Eternal Masters who can enter the Xuanlei Black Valley, it is not easy for him to obtain the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and he may have to fight with other Eternal Controllers.

With his current strength, he is not afraid of other Eternal Masters.

For example, he can be regarded as a six-domain-level controller, while the average eternal controller is only a domain-level controller, and his strength is far inferior to him.

Xuanhei Thunder Valley is very large, Ye Tian has been looking for a long time, but he has not seen the end of Xuanlei Black Valley.

this day.

He finally discovered the traces of the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, on a pitch-black earth, there was a giant tree, and there were six Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits growing on this giant tree, and the golden light came out from the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, tearing apart the darkness of the Xuanlei Black Valley.

There is no doubt that this must be the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit Tree.

However, none of these six Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits were ripe, except for one Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, which only needed three thousand world river years to grow, the other five Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits still needed a long time to fully grow.

However, under this Xuanlei Golden Body Tree, there was an Eternal Controller sitting cross-legged, and this Eternal Ruler had probably been guarding here for countless years.

When Ye Tian approached here, the other party opened his eyes.

"This Xuanlei Golden Body Tree belongs to my !!"

A strong hostility permeated from the other party's body, and it seemed that as long as Ye Tian got closer, he would make a move.

Ye Tian didn't care about the other party's strength, this eternal controller seemed to be just a second-level controller.

However, the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit has not yet fully grown, so there is no need to fight with it at this time.

Wait for a few thousand river years, and then come back then.

For the sake of resources, it doesn't hurt to offend the other Eternal Masters.

In short, whoever has the strength can grab resources, that's the truth!

Subsequently, Ye Tian left and went to look for other places.

Along the way, all the Xuanlei Golden Body Trees he found were occupied by the Eternal Master.

"Master, I still have to rely on myself to snatch this great opportunity you gave!"

Ye Tian said helplessly.

However, if it weren't for the master, he wouldn't have been able to come here, so this can be regarded as a big opportunity.

In short, the stronger he is, the more benefits he can naturally get.

this day.

Ye Tian found a Xuanlei Golden Body Tree with only three Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits, but there were eternal controllers squatting near here, and the one who occupied the Xuanlei Golden Body Tree was a first-level master, and the other party was very nervous at this time.

"It's being targeted here!"

Ye Tian paid attention.

He found that one of the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruits would only be truly and completely grown in only one-tenth of the Realm River Year, and it was precisely because of this that there were so many Eternal Masters squatting here.

Once this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit grows up, I am afraid that there will be a lot of fighting.

"Everyone, give me a face, it's good to give me this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, I will take this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit and leave, and the remaining two will not compete with you. "

Said the Crane Controller.

He knew that his strength was very weak, and he might not be able to keep this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, but he didn't want to give up!

He has been guarding here for a long time, just for this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

If he had this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, he would even have the hope of completing the breakthrough of the Body of Control, so as to raise his combat power to the level of a second-level master, and his strength would not be at the bottom of the master.

He finally got the opportunity to enter the Xuanlei Black Valley, so he didn't want to give up.

But many of the Eternal Masters who are staring at this place are stronger than him, and once they fight, he is even in danger of falling.

How to choose?

Whether to retreat immediately to save his life, or fight desperately, he occupies a favorable place, and the other eternal controllers contain each other, not necessarily as good as his chance of seizing the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

When it really came to the moment when the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit was completely grown, he still had a lot of hope.

"Bet!"

The True Crane Controller decided that if he didn't leave, he would definitely snatch this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

Time passes, and there are more and more eternal masters gathered here.

Finally, on this day, this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit was about to grow completely, and the atmosphere began to be tense.

Not long after the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit was about to be born, the True Crane Controller made a move, that is, to instantly accelerate time, that is, to accelerate the growth of the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and let it grow in advance.

"Do it!"

Buzz Buzz!!

The speed of the Eternal Controller was very fast, and at the moment when the True Crane Controller was about to take away this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, several attacks blasted, directly knocking it away, tearing his body apart in an instant, leaving him seriously injured.

"This Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit is mine!"

"Get out, don't rob me!"

At the same time, these Eternal Masters all grabbed the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit.

And at this time, Ye Tian made a move.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian unleashed a thousand kills, dancing the Hundred Realms Stick into a series of stick shadows, knocking the eternal controllers into the air.

But he kept his hand and didn't kill them, after all, every Eternal Master has an unusual background, and if there is a backstage, killing them will undoubtedly make enemies for himself.

Although he has the Ten Elements Ancestor as a backer, there is no need to deliberately make enemies.

Bang bang bang!!

Many Eternal Masters were knocked away by Ye Tian one by one, and they were severely injured and powerless to snatch them.

And this Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit naturally fell into Ye Tian's hands, and he took it off and put it away.

"Six-Domain Master!"

They were shocked that such a strong man had also come.

Many strong people have taken the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit, and some of them can only refine two if they die, and they can't continue refining in the later stage, so there is no need to snatch the Xuanlei Golden Body Fruit again.

Therefore, in the Xuanlei Black Valley, there are still very few eternal controllers above the sixth domain level.

And the six realm-level eternal masters will occupy a huge Xuanlei Golden Body Tree, and others don't dare to snatch it, they can just keep it, if they run to snatch it, the Xuanlei Golden Body Tree they occupy will be snatched away by other equally strong people, then it will not be cost-effective.

"Unlucky, I met such a strong person, very unfamiliar, I should have just come in. "

These eternal masters gave up and retreated one by one.
